visualizerParams.title: Optimizing Stock Profit with O(n)
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided `max_profit` function iterates over the prices and finds the minimum and maximum seen so far. This is an efficient O(n) approach. Refactor it to use more Pythonic techniques or built-ins while maintaining this efficiency.

solution.explanation: Refactoring using `min()` and `max()` within the loop makes the logic more expressive. Initializing `min_p` to infinity allows us to handle the empty list case gracefully if prices are non-negative.
